title: Implement Invite Code System with Welcome Screen

requirements.text: Create backend invite code generation function that generates unique one-time use invite codes and stores them in a Map with associated team/family information

quotes: Invite‑Code‑Logik wie in der anderen App: Einmalig verwendbar, Map-Speicher, Code wird gelöscht nach Verwendung

acceptanceCriteria: Backend exports a createInviteCode function that generates a unique code
Invite codes are stored in a Map with team/family ID and role information
Each invite code can only be used once

requirements.text: Create backend invite code validation function that checks if a code exists, returns the associated team information, and deletes the code after successful use
acceptanceCriteria: Backend exports a useInviteCode function that validates invite codes
Function returns team/family information if code is valid
Code is automatically deleted from Map after successful validation
Function returns error if code does not exist or has already been used

requirements.text: Export all invite-related backend actor methods to fix 'Actor not available' error

quotes: Alle Actor-Methoden korrekt exportieren, um 'Actor not available' zu beheben
This error means the frontend calls an Actor function that does not exist or is not exported in the backend

acceptanceCriteria: All invite-related functions are properly exported as public actor methods
Frontend can successfully call createInviteCode and useInviteCode without 'Actor not available' errors

requirements.text: Create welcome screen with app icon at top, centered layout similar to FamilyHub screenshot

quotes: Welcome screen with app icon/logo at top
Clean, centered layout similar to the FamilyHub screenshot

acceptanceCriteria: Welcome screen displays app icon/logo at top center
Layout is clean and centered on the page
Visual design follows general pattern from uploaded FamilyHub screenshot

requirements.text: Add 'Create a New Family' button (green/primary style) that makes the user the admin/owner and initializes a new family/team

quotes: 'Create a New Family' (green primary button) - makes user the admin/owner

acceptanceCriteria: Button is styled as primary action (green color)
Clicking button creates a new family/team with current user as admin/owner
User is redirected to main app after family creation

requirements.text: Add 'Join Existing Family' button (gray/secondary style) that prompts user to enter an invite code

quotes: 'Join Existing Family' (gray secondary button) - user enters invite code

acceptanceCriteria: Button is styled as secondary action (gray color)
Clicking button opens input dialog for entering invite code
After entering valid code, user joins the corresponding family/team
User is redirected to main app after successful join

requirements.text: Add 'or' text divider between the two main action buttons on welcome screen
acceptanceCriteria: Text 'or' appears centered between the two main buttons
Divider is visually subtle but clearly separates the two options

requirements.text: Add logout link at bottom of welcome screen for users who want to switch identities
acceptanceCriteria: Logout link appears at bottom of welcome screen
Clicking logout logs user out via Internet Identity
User returns to login page after logout

requirements.text: Show welcome screen to authenticated users who have not yet joined or created a family/team

quotes: Neuer Startscreen wie im zweiten Screenshot: 'Neues Projekt erstellen' oder 'Bestehendem Projekt beitreten'

acceptanceCriteria: Welcome screen is shown after login if user has no family/team association
Users who have already joined or created a family see the main app instead
Screen properly handles authentication state

constraints: All Motoko logic must remain in the single main actor file (backend/main.mo)
Do not modify immutable frontend paths: useInternetIdentity.ts, useInternetIdentity.tsx, useActor.ts, main.tsx, components/ui
Use existing Internet Identity authentication system
nonGoals: Changes to authentication system beyond logout flow
Exact pixel-perfect match to FamilyHub screenshot
Advanced invite code features (expiration, role limits)
